message:
feat: Integrate rich_rust for enhanced terminal output

Add rich output capabilities with theme support:

- New src/rich/ module wrapping rich_rust for caut-specific use
- Theme configuration via CAUT_THEME environment variable
- Conditional rich output based on format and terminal capabilities
- Update human.rs and doctor.rs to use rich rendering
- Add verification script for rich_rust dependency
- E2E script for testing rich logging behavior

The rich integration enables:
- Colorful, styled terminal output
- Consistent theming across caut commands
- Graceful fallback for non-TTY contexts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,36 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+BIN="${CAUT_BIN:-target/debug/caut}"
+
+if [[ ! -x "$BIN" ]]; then
+  echo "Building caut..."
+  cargo build >/dev/null
+fi
+
+echo "Testing logging with robot mode..."
+output=$(CAUT_LOG=debug "$BIN" --debug-rich --json 2>&1 || true)
+if echo "$output" | grep -q "robot_mode"; then
+  echo "PASS: Robot mode logged"
+else
+  echo "FAIL: Robot mode not logged"
+  exit 1
+fi
+
+echo "Testing JSON log format..."
+json_logs=$(CAUT_LOG=debug CAUT_LOG_FORMAT=json "$BIN" --debug-rich --json 2>/dev/null || true)
+first_line=$(printf "%s" "$json_logs" | head -n 1)
+if echo "$first_line" | jq . >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+  echo "PASS: JSON format valid"
+else
+  echo "WARN: JSON format may have issues"
+fi
+
+echo "Testing debug diagnostics..."
+output=$("$BIN" --debug-rich 2>&1 || true)
+if echo "$output" | grep -q "stdout is TTY"; then
+  echo "PASS: Debug diagnostics work"
+else
+  echo "FAIL: Debug diagnostics missing"
+  exit 1
+fi

@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+echo "=== Verifying rich_rust dependency ==="
+
+if ! grep -q 'rich_rust' Cargo.toml; then
+    echo "ERROR: rich_rust not found in Cargo.toml"
+    exit 1
+fi
+
+echo "Building project..."
+cargo build 2>&1 | head -50
+
+echo "Running smoke tests..."
+cargo test rich::tests --lib -- --nocapture
+
+echo "Checking binary size..."
+cargo build --release
+ls -lh target/release/caut
+
+echo "=== Verification complete ==="
